get.summary: ListAgents lists Agents in a namespace or across all namespaces.
ListAgentTools lists AgentTools in a namespace or across all namespaces.
ListModelProviders lists ModelProviders in a namespace or across all namespaces.
ListModels lists Models in a namespace or across all namespaces.

get.summary: ListAgents lists Agents in a namespace or across all namespaces.
GetAgent retrieves an Agent by name and namespace.
ListAgentTools lists AgentTools in a namespace or across all namespaces.
GetAgentTool retrieves an AgentTool by name and namespace.

put.summary: UpdateAgentToolStatus updates only the status subresource.

get.summary: ListModelProviders lists ModelProviders in a namespace or across all namespaces.
GetModelProvider retrieves a ModelProvider by name and namespace.

put.summary: UpdateModelProviderStatus updates only the status subresource.

get.summary: ListModels lists Models in a namespace or across all namespaces.
GetModel retrieves a Model by name and namespace.

put.summary: UpdateModelStatus updates only the status subresource.

get.summary: WatchAgents watches for changes to Agents.
WatchAgentTools watches for changes to AgentTools.
WatchModelProviders watches for changes to ModelProviders.
WatchModels watches for changes to Models.
WatchAgents watches for changes to Agents.
WatchAgentTools watches for changes to AgentTools.
WatchModelProviders watches for changes to ModelProviders.
WatchModels watches for changes to Models.

protobufNullValue.description:
`NullValue` is a singleton enumeration to represent the null value for the
`Value` type union.

The JSON representation for `NullValue` is JSON `null`.

 - NULL_VALUE: Null value.

v1alpha1Agent.description: Agent is the top-level Agent resource.

v1alpha1AgentCard.description: AgentCard contains agent metadata following A2A protocol.

v1alpha1AgentExtension.description: AgentExtension represents an extension with parameters.

v1alpha1AgentList.description: AgentList contains a list of Agent resources.

v1alpha1AgentPhase.description: AgentPhase represents the current phase of the agent lifecycle.

security.title: Security schemes represented as a list of requirements (OR of ANDs)

v1alpha1AgentSkill.description: AgentSkill describes a specific capability or function.

v1alpha1AgentSpec.description: AgentSpec defines the desired state of an Agent.

v1alpha1AgentStatus.description: AgentStatus defines the observed state of Agent.

v1alpha1AgentTool.description: AgentTool is the top-level AgentTool resource.

v1alpha1AgentToolList.description: AgentToolList contains a list of AgentTool resources.

v1alpha1AgentToolSpec.description: AgentToolSpec defines the desired state of AgentTool.

v1alpha1AgentToolStatus.description: AgentToolStatus defines the observed state of AgentTool.

v1alpha1AgentToolType.description: AgentToolType represents the type of tool.

v1alpha1AnthropicContainerConfig.description: AnthropicContainerConfig defines container configuration for multi-turn.

v1alpha1Condition.description: Condition represents a condition for a Kubernetes resource.

v1alpha1ConfigMapEnvSource.description: ConfigMapEnvSource references a ConfigMap for env vars.

v1alpha1ConfigMapKeyRef.description: ConfigMapKeyRef references a key in a ConfigMap.

v1alpha1ConfigMapKeySelector.description: ConfigMapKeySelector references a key in a ConfigMap.

v1alpha1ConfigMapProjection.description: ConfigMapProjection projects a config map into a volume.

v1alpha1ConfigMapVolumeSource.description: ConfigMapVolumeSource adapts a ConfigMap into a volume.

v1alpha1ContainerPort.description: ContainerPort represents a port on a container.

v1alpha1DeleteAgentToolResponse.description: DeleteAgentToolResponse is the response for DeleteAgentTool.

v1alpha1DeleteModelProviderResponse.description: DeleteModelProviderResponse is the response for DeleteModelProvider.

v1alpha1DeleteModelResponse.description: DeleteModelResponse is the response for DeleteModel.

v1alpha1DeleteOptions.description: DeleteOptions contains options for delete operations.

v1alpha1DownwardAPIProjection.description: DownwardAPIProjection projects downward API info into a volume.

v1alpha1DownwardAPIVolumeFile.description: DownwardAPIVolumeFile represents a file with downward API info.

v1alpha1EmptyDirVolumeSource.description: EmptyDirVolumeSource represents an empty directory volume.

v1alpha1EnvFromSource.description: EnvFromSource represents a source for environment variables.

v1alpha1EnvVarSource.description: EnvVarSource represents a source for an environment variable's value.

v1alpha1ExecAction.description: ExecAction describes a command to execute.

v1alpha1Framework.description: Framework represents the AI framework used by the agent.

v1alpha1GRPCAction.description: GRPCAction describes a gRPC health check.

v1alpha1GoogleThinkingConfig.description: GoogleThinkingConfig defines thinking configuration for Google models.

v1alpha1HTTPApiSpec.description: HTTPApiSpec defines configuration for HTTP API tools.

v1alpha1HTTPGetAction.description: HTTPGetAction describes an HTTP GET request.

v1alpha1HostPathVolumeSource.description: HostPathVolumeSource represents a host path volume.

v1alpha1KeyToPath.description: KeyToPath maps a key to a file path.

v1alpha1LabelSelector.description: LabelSelector is a label query over a set of resources.

v1alpha1ListMeta.description: ListMeta contains metadata for list operations.

v1alpha1ListOptions.description: ListOptions contains options for list operations.

v1alpha1LocalObjectReference.description: LocalObjectReference references a local object by name.

v1alpha1Model.description: Model is the top-level Model resource.

v1alpha1ModelList.description: ModelList contains a list of Model resources.

openai.title: Provider-specific parameters (only one should be set)

v1alpha1ModelParameters.description: ModelParameters defines model parameters with provider-specific extensions.

v1alpha1ModelProvider.description: ModelProvider is the top-level ModelProvider resource.

v1alpha1ModelProviderList.description: ModelProviderList contains a list of ModelProvider resources.

openai.title: Exactly one of the following should be set

v1alpha1ModelProviderSpec.description: ModelProviderSpec defines the desired state of ModelProvider.

v1alpha1ModelProviderStatus.description: ModelProviderStatus defines the observed state of ModelProvider.

v1alpha1ModelSpec.description: ModelSpec defines the desired state of Model.

v1alpha1ModelStatus.description: ModelStatus defines the observed state of Model.

v1alpha1NodeAffinity.description: NodeAffinity defines node affinity scheduling rules.

v1alpha1ObjectFieldSelector.description: ObjectFieldSelector selects an APIVersioned field of an object.

ObjectMeta contains metadata that all persisted resources must have.

v1alpha1OwnerReference.description: OwnerReference contains information about the owning object.

v1alpha1PodAffinity.description: PodAffinity defines pod affinity scheduling rules.

v1alpha1PodAffinityTerm.description: PodAffinityTerm defines a pod affinity term.

v1alpha1PodAntiAffinity.description: PodAntiAffinity defines pod anti-affinity scheduling rules.

v1alpha1PreferredSchedulingTerm.description: PreferredSchedulingTerm is a preferred scheduling term.

v1alpha1ProbeHandler.description: ProbeHandler defines a health check action.

v1alpha1ProviderType.description: ProviderType represents the LLM provider type.

v1alpha1RuntimeSpec.description: RuntimeSpec defines the runtime backend configuration.

v1alpha1RuntimeType.description: RuntimeType represents the type of runtime backend.

v1alpha1SELinuxOptions.description: SELinuxOptions are the SELinux context settings.

v1alpha1SecretEnvSource.description: SecretEnvSource references a Secret for env vars.

v1alpha1SecretKeySelector.description: SecretKeySelector references a specific key within a Secret.

v1alpha1SecretProjection.description: SecretProjection projects a secret into a volume.

v1alpha1SecretVolumeSource.description: SecretVolumeSource adapts a Secret into a volume.

v1alpha1SecurityContext.description: SecurityContext holds security configuration for a container.

v1alpha1SecurityRequirement.description: SecurityRequirement represents a security scheme requirement.

v1alpha1SecurityScopes.description: SecurityScopes contains the scopes for a security scheme.

v1alpha1ServiceAccountTokenProjection.description: ServiceAccountTokenProjection projects a service account token.

v1alpha1StandardRuntimeSpec.description: StandardRuntimeSpec defines the Deployment-based runtime configuration.

v1alpha1TCPSocketAction.description: TCPSocketAction describes a TCP socket check.

v1alpha1TLSConfig.description: TLSConfig defines TLS settings for custom endpoints.

v1alpha1ToolEntry.description: ToolEntry represents either an inline tool or a reference.

v1alpha1VolumeMount.description: VolumeMount describes a mounting of a Volume within a container.

v1alpha1VolumeProjection.description: VolumeProjection is a projection of a volume source.

v1alpha1VolumeSource.description: VolumeSource represents the source of a volume.

v1alpha1WatchAgentToolsResponse.description: WatchAgentToolsResponse is a single event in the watch stream.

v1alpha1WatchAgentsResponse.description: WatchAgentsResponse is a single event in the watch stream.

v1alpha1WatchAgentsResponseEventType.description: EventType represents the type of watch event.

v1alpha1WatchModelProvidersResponse.description: WatchModelProvidersResponse is a single event in the watch stream.

v1alpha1WatchModelsResponse.description: WatchModelsResponse is a single event in the watch stream.

v1alpha1WeightedPodAffinityTerm.description: WeightedPodAffinityTerm is a weighted pod affinity term.
